concerns.text: FR-008 mandates a sensitivity analysis sweeping hub thresholds {0.08, 0.10, 0.12}. The plan.md 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' sections define a fixed top-10% threshold and do not mention a parameter sweep, loop, or sensitivity analysis module. No code file (e.g., `sensitivity.py`) or task is listed to implement this requirement.

SC-004 requires measuring sensitivity across the mandatory swept thresholds {0.08, 0.10, 0.12}. Since FR-008 is unbacked in the plan, there is no corresponding plan element to measure this specific outcome, leaving the success criterion untestable.
